title: Recurring notifications on Slack
excerpt: I know we can create an automation to send recurring notifications via Outlook (every time period, if status is something, send an email to someone), but is it possible to create a similar recipe to notify a Slack channe…

posts.author: simone.steffen (Simone Steffen)
posts.cookedHtml: I know we can create an automation to send recurring notifications via Outlook (every time period, if status is something, send an email to someone), but is it possible to create a similar recipe to notify a Slack channel? I’ve looked everywhere and I can’t seem to find it.
